[쿼리 데이터]

사용 쿼리:
SELECT rollup('sec', 7, time) as time, count(value) as value from bbox
 where name = 'cam-neumann' 
   and time between to_date('2026-02-11 16:52:00') and to_date('2026-02-11 17:10:00')
 group by time order by time;



응답 데이터:

API 요청 데이터:
interval: 7
start: 2026-02-11T07:52:00.000Z
end: 2026-02-11T08:10:00.000Z
